About

Nice to meet ya.

Most brands launching at Walmart, Target, Costco, or Sephora don't make it past 120 days. Not because their product failed. Because they didn't build infrastructure that could survive the system.

We're Retail Buddy. We've run operations for Fortune 500 companies — 300+ distribution centers and suppliers, dozens of CPG brands, compliance traps and chargebacks you can imagine.

Our method
Humans first. Business second. We study the people in the system before we touch the system itself.
Our scope
Fixed scope, 12–18 weeks. No open-ended retainers. You know exactly what you're getting and when.
Our model
We support brands getting to shelf and brands already there. 15–20 engagements a year. Fixed scope. Some of them we acquire — add to our portfolio.

Services

01

Intelligence-as-a-Service™

We design and execute strategic projects that build operational intelligence, not dependency.

Launch Readiness
  • Retail readiness audits
  • EDI integration and systems connectivity
  • Logistics and distribution strategy
  • Reverse logistics and international returns
  • 3PL and fulfillment setup
  • Retail readiness frameworks
Sustainment & Optimization
  • Demand & supply architecture
  • Procurement systems design
  • Forecasting & distribution optimization
  • Performance improvement and troubleshooting

For founders who want to keep equity and pay for expertise.

02

Growth Equity & Strategy

  • Intelligence Capital™ — We acquire, refine, and grow businesses built to last — combining capital, operational precision, and design-level thinking.
  • Ideal candidates generate $250K–$750K in SDE and operate within retail, supply chain, or technology — where operational intelligence can unlock scale.

For founders ready to exit and looking for an operator-investor who can scale what they've built.

03

Venture Studio

  • Available for select equity partnerships — By invitation only

CPG Growth Summit

The best deals happen at dinner.

An exclusive gathering of forward-thinking CPG brands and big-box retail leaders designed for meaningful collaboration and impactful networking. The CPG Growth dinner will provide invaluable insights and actionable opportunities to elevate your presence in big-box retail.
